creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like missing ssl headers, I'll have a closer look a little later.
 Do you have any additional flags in /etc/make.conf?  If so, can you
post your make.conf (or at least relevant parts) somewhere?

As a side note, next time, please add a very short problem description
to the subject line as well, it is easier to triage and handle PRs then.
Regards!
-- 
Niclas Zeising
